author: Ameen Hassan
summary: The session was a minimal status check. The user asked whether their MCP server was connected. The assistant confirmed that multiple MCP servers were active based on the deferred tools visible in the session context, including computer-use (desktop control) and Claude_in_Chrome/Control_Chrome/Claude_Preview (browser automation). No substantive work was performed beyond this connectivity verification.
problems: User wanted to verify MCP server connectivity status
approaches: Inspected deferred tools listed in system-reminder to infer which MCP servers were connected and responding
results: MCP servers confirmed connected: computer-use, Claude_in_Chrome, Control_Chrome, Claude_Preview, and ameen-context among others visible in deferred tool list
